content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 4, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 4, 2026, focused on refining the agent framework's cloud infrastructure, enhancing the continuous-chat UI, and stabilizing the Odysseus task coordinator. Key achievements include migrating cloud routing, improving prompt suggestion logic, and resolving critical state-management bugs in sub-agent orchestration.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & Routing**
*   Replaced BitRouter cloud routing with a new implementation ([#8233](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8233)).
*   Fixed default model routing to ensure Cerebras models are prioritized correctly ([#8241](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8241)).
*   Wired cloud SSO `/pair` handlers into the HTTP server ([#8236](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8236)).
*   Updated `hono` dependencies across cloud packages ([#8243](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8243)).

**UI/UX Enhancements**
*   Implemented time-of-day and history-aware prompt suggestions for the continuous-chat overlay ([#8224](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8224)).
*   Added hover/focus-based reveal animations for chat bubbles and suggestions ([#8229](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8229)).
*   Restored the inline chevron expand affordance to the chat overlay ([#8218](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8218)).
*   Cleaned up dead Storybook stories ([#8220](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8220)).

**Odysseus & Plugin Refinement**
*   Extracted the calendar surface into a first-class `@elizaos/plugin-calendar` ([#8219](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8219)).
*   Fixed state-parity and focus bugs in Odysseus views, including CompareView round resets and NotesPanel input handling ([#8204](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8204), [#8226](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8226), [#8227](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8227), [#8230](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8230)).
*   Improved developer experience with reliable agent hot-reloading ([#8228](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8228)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Cloud & Infrastructure:** [#8223](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8223) (Shared runtime provisioning), [#8239](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8239) (Dependency updates).
*   **Task Coordinator:** [#8221](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8221) (Cookbook Serve per-model uninstall).
*   **Maintenance:** A series of dependency updates for `hono`, `capacitor`, `atproto`, `opentelemetry`, `github-script`, `labeler`, `codeql`, `upload-artifact`, `gh-pages`, `transformers`, and `pynput` ([#8206](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8206), [#8207](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8207), [#8208](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8208), [#8209](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8209), [#8210](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8210), [#8211](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8211), [#8212](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8212), [#8213](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8213), [#8214](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8214), [#8215](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8215), [#8216](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8216), [#8217](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8217)).
*   **Fixes:** [#8205](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8205) (Bun source-mode startup).

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Orchestrator & Sub-Agent Stability**
*   Resolved issues regarding sub-agent completion narration and deliverable truncation ([#8162](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8162)).
*   Addressed dependency resolution errors in `app-core` when bundling for external environments ([#8142](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8142)).

**Odysseus & UI Components**
*   Clarified that `CalendarView` is intended to remain local-first, closing the request for backend wiring ([#8203](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8203)).
*   Resolved Storybook rendering blocks caused by Vite dependency optimization ([#8177](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8177)).

## NEW ISSUES
*   **UI/UX:** [#8225](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8225) proposes a new `/api/suggestions` endpoint to provide server-tailored prompt suggestions.
*   **Voice Pipeline:** [#8234](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8234) identifies that voice-to-entity binding is unreachable at runtime, preventing speaker persistence.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#8162](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8162) Orchestrator Narration:** Extensive discussion on sub-agent routing and state-lost recovery. Contributors established that the fix requires router-internal deterministic recovery rather than relying on the planner, and confirmed that deliverable-drop issues were mitigated by structural carrier updates.
*   **[#8234](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8234) Voice-Entity Binding:** Investigation revealed that the binding logic was unreachable due to incorrect route mounting. The fix involves registering voice profile routes as `rawPath` routes on the plugin object to ensure they are accessible via both the agent server and app-core.
